text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm number one! The fastest, the
strongest—the true number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You better have been watching me take the
number one spot!
choice_data_list: You did it, Scarlet! You're number one!
You did it, Scarlet! You're number one!
Now let's aim for an even better number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You better have been watching me take the
number one spot!
choice_data_list: You did it, Scarlet! You're number one!
You did it, Scarlet! You're number one!
Now let's aim for an even better number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
W-well as long as you understand! Make sure you
burn the image of my victory into your mind!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ I'll be number one next time too—no
matter what!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me?! You're supposed to be showering
me with praise!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure my next win is an even bigger one
then!
